name: EBS Volume Type Migration
description: Migrate EBS volumes from one type to another (e.g., gp2 to gp3) for better performance or cost optimization

template.description: Migrating EBS volumes from {{currentType}} to {{targetType}} for {{instanceCount}} EC2 instances. Each volume is {{volumeSize}} GB. Migration will be performed using EBS Elastic Volumes feature for online modification without downtime. Monitoring IOPS and throughput during and after migration.
template.currentState: {{instanceCount}} EC2 instances with {{currentType}} EBS volumes ({{volumeSize}} GB each). Current IOPS: baseline 3 IOPS/GB. No performance issues observed. Volumes used for application data, databases, and logs.
template.proposedState: Volumes modified to {{targetType}} using Elastic Volumes API. For gp3: 3000 IOPS baseline and 125 MB/s throughput. Modification performed during maintenance window. CloudWatch monitoring for volume performance metrics and application impact.
template.trafficPatterns: Production workloads with variable I/O patterns. Database workloads with random reads/writes. Peak I/O during business hours. Average utilization: 60% of provisioned IOPS. Latency-sensitive applications requiring consistent performance.
